subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire ignited in the divine Tree! For several years thy respected father dwelt in the presence of the Ancient Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعل بنار موقده در سدره ربانیه جناب ابوی چند سال بود که در جوار جمال قدم
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
